character.name: Warblade
character.prompt: battle-scarred warrior holding a massive two-handed greatsword with both hands gripping the hilt at waist level, dark iron plate armor with glowing blue rift energy cracks along chest pauldrons and gauntlets, messy dark hair visible under a broken visor helmet, no shield no offhand weapon only the greatsword, dimensional rift fractures glow on armor, dark fantasy mercenary, gritty and worn
